symptomsPlaceholder: Describe your symptoms in your own words...
translationWarning: Translation for the selected language is currently unavailable. Some text may appear in English.
heroBadge: Allopathy · Ayurveda · Homeopathy · Home Remedies - unified
heroDescription: Sanjeevani triages your symptoms, orchestrates an integrative treatment plan, checks for herb-drug interactions, and explains everything in your own language, using a local offline model when available and a clinician always in the loop.
orchestratorDescription: From multilingual intake to evidence-grounded recommendations, each step is auditable and human-reviewable.
workflowDescription: Patient input is normalized, mapped to ICD/SNOMED and Ayurvedic dosha tags, run through risk triage, then routed to specialist agents. The Safety Review agent checks for cross-modality conflicts before the plan is translated and presented.
workflow01Desc: Free-text symptoms in your language, structured by the LLM.
workflow02Desc: Rule + ML hybrid produces a risk level with confidence.
workflow06Desc: Edit, approve, store feedback for continuous learning.
safetyDescription: Every recommendation surfaces its evidence tier, every plan is bounded to two modalities by default, and any red flag escalates instantly to emergency care. Clinicians retain final authority.
modulePatientIntakeDesc: Multilingual structured capture with ICD/SNOMED + Ayurvedic dosha mapping.
moduleRiskTriageDesc: Hybrid rule + ML triage: emergent -> urgent -> routine -> self-care.
moduleOfflineLlmDesc: Local Ollama synthesis for specialist-style recommendations without cloud dependency.
moduleCareOrchestrationDesc: Routes to GP or specialist; up to two modalities by default.
moduleAyurvedaDesc: Dosha-based guidance grounded in classical AYUSH texts.
moduleHomeopathyDesc: Constitutional remedies surfaced as complementary options.
moduleHomeRemediesDesc: Safe self-care that won't conflict with prescribed therapy.
moduleSafetyDesc: Herb-drug interactions and contraindications flagged in real time.
moduleMultilingualDesc: English <-> Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi and more with back-translation.
moduleEvidenceDesc: Citations from WHO, ICMR, AYUSH with reliability tiers A/B/T.
moduleClinicianDesc: Every plan can be reviewed, edited and approved by a clinician.
footerBrandDescription: AI Integrative Multilingual Telehealth Orchestrator. Decision-support, not a substitute for medical judgement.
footerSafetyDescription: Every plan passes through cross-modality conflict checks and a human-in-the-loop clinician review before being acted upon.
footerCopyright: © {{year}} Sanjeevani Health · For research and clinical decision-support only.
patientMemorySignedIn: Signed-in patients can reuse their previous intake details and save new results into the local offline database.
patientMemorySignedOut: Sign in from the patient portal to reuse prior data and build a local longitudinal patient history.
lastRecordEmpty: No offline patient history yet. The first completed intake will be stored locally for future reuse.
blankIntakeHint: New intakes now start blank. Use "Reuse previous data" only when you want to carry details forward.
patientProfileHelp: Contact and demographic details help clinician review, longitudinal patient history, and route selection.
voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge.
recentTravelPlaceholder: Any recent travel, hospitalization, or stay outside your city
recentExposurePlaceholder: Sick contacts, food poisoning, dust exposure, mosquito exposure
preferenceHelp: The live care path is capped at two modalities unless a clinician overrides it, but the result screen will still show all available treatment pathways.
intakeSafetyInfo: Hybrid triage, safety rules, multilingual output, and clinician review run locally. When the Ollama model is reachable, Sanjeevani also uses an offline LLM to broaden treatment options across all modalities and localize the full result view.
intakeDisclaimer: Sanjeevani provides decision-support, not a diagnosis. Call local emergency services if you are in danger.
previousDataLoaded: Previous patient data loaded into the intake form.
blankIntakeStarted: Started a fresh blank intake form.
symptomsDurationRequired: Please describe your symptoms and how long you've had them.
historySaveFailed: The care plan was created, but local patient history could not be saved.
offlineClinicalModelDescription: This intake flow can use the local Ollama model on your machine for specialist-style synthesis, while the rule engine and hybrid triage remain the final safety authority.
patientPortalDemo: Uses a real offline local database in your browser. Demo patient login: patient@sanjeevani.demo / demo123.
signInToViewHistory: Sign in with a local patient account to view previous intakes and reuse earlier data during the next consultation.
noPreviousRecords: No previous offline patient records yet.
clinicianTitle: You stay in control of every plan.
clinicianDescription: Sign in to review the AI's plans, edit modality choices, approve or reject, and run ad-hoc drug-herb safety scans. Every action is audited.
reviewQueueDesc: All AI-generated plans pending sign-off, sorted by risk.
editApproveDesc: Override modality choices, add notes, lock the final plan.
conflictEscalationsDesc: Cross-modality conflicts routed for safety review.
auditFeedbackDesc: Every decision is logged; corrections retrain the orchestrator.
runningLocalDemo: Running in local demo mode. You can create a clinician account here or use the seeded demo login: clinician@sanjeevani.demo / demo123.
runningSupabase: Running with Supabase authentication for the clinician portal.
localClinicianCreated: Local clinician account created and signed in.
accountCreatedCanSignIn: Account created. You can sign in.
offlineAgentSettingsDescription: Normalization, specialist synthesis, and safety summaries can use the local Ollama model. The deterministic safety layer still remains final authority.
newPatientIntakeCardDesc: Walk through the multilingual intake flow.
interactionCheckerCardDesc: Run an ad-hoc cross-modality safety scan.
interactionScannerDescription: Cross-checks allopathic drugs against herbs, Ayurvedic remedies, supplements, comorbidities and allergies for clinically meaningful interactions.
interactionScannerInfo: This scanner runs from the same hybrid safety pipeline as the intake orchestrator, including the capstone examples for SSRI plus St. John's Wort and hypertension plus warming herbs.
offlineSafetySynthesisDescription: The safety rules remain deterministic. The local model is used only to summarize resolution guidance when available.
scanRequired: Provide medications and/or herbs to scan.
clinicianOverrideDescription: Edit the structured plan directly. The saved JSON becomes the new auditable plan version for this case.
decisionNotesPlaceholder: Notes for the override / approval decision...
editablePlanInvalid: The editable plan JSON is invalid. Please fix the JSON before saving.
offlineModelFallback: Offline model unavailable, deterministic fallback used
watchForThese: Watch for these - seek care immediately
translationUnavailableDynamic: The selected language could not be fully generated for this result. Some dynamic content is shown in English fallback.
